hooks.prompt: Evaluate whether Claude should stop. Input: $ARGUMENTS. Claude is building an IDP per spec/BUILD-SPEC.md. Block the stop if: 1) No <promise>PHASEX_DONE</promise> tag was output, 2) Test criteria for the current phase are not all passing, 3) SCORECARD.md was not updated for completed components. Explain what still needs to be done.

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Session started. Read spec/BUILD-SPEC.md and spec/SCORECARD.md to determine current phase and progress. Check .current-phase file. Do not proceed without understanding where you are in the build."}'
